untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-factor portfolio volatility calculations and dynamic weighting across asset classes based on 3-year rolling volatility estimates. The allowed indicators are single-asset technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.) and do not support: (1) cross-asset volatility comparisons, (2) factor allocation weighting schemes, (3) portfolio-level rebalancing logic, (4) 3-year rolling volatility computation across multiple factors. The signal is a portfolio construction rule, not a single-asset entry/exit signal that can be expressed as atomic conditions on price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Risk Parity is a strategic asset allocation framework requiring access to multiple assets/factors, their volatility time series, and portfolio optimization logic. This is fundamentally incompatible with a single-asset backtest engine that uses technical indicators. Recommend implementing this as a separate portfolio optimization module rather than a traditional trading signal rule.
